privileged_info_summary: The baseline SUMO scenario for Bologna Pasubio is located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. The designated output directory is /home/ga/SUMO_Output. The expected vType for the micro-mobility vehicle is escooter with a vClass of bicycle.
